data.title: Bitcoin Climbs Past $115,000 on Inflation Relief and ETF Flows, But Bearish Signals Loom
data.description:
Bitcoin (BTC) has extended, surging to a three-week high of $115,500, fueled by softer U. S. inflation data and steady inflows into Bitcoin ETFs. The rally coincided with growing investor optimism that the Federal Reserve may deliver a 25 basis-point rate cut next week, further boosting risk appetite
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/bitcoin-news/bitcoin-climbs-past-115000-on-inflation-relief-and-etf-flows-but-bearish-signals-loom/

data.title: Bitdeer Reports Significant Increase in Bitcoin Mining Capacity for August
data.description:
According to PANews, Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin mining company Bitdeer has released its unaudited mining and operational update for August. The company reported a 35% increase in self-mining capacity, reaching 30 EH/s, with a target to achieve 40 EH/s by October. In August, Bitdeer mined 375 BTC, marking a 33% month-over-month growth.
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/29614803597249?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS

data.title: Whales Increase PEPE Holdings with Significant Purchases
data.description:
According to Foresight News, several major investors are acquiring large amounts of PEPE tokens. Onchain Lens monitoring reveals that a whale with the address starting 0x7c8 spent $2. 5 million in USDT to purchase 213. 46 billion PEPE tokens, transferring them to their main wallet
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/29612654718858?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS

data.title: Polymarket Seeks New Funding Round Amid Valuation Fluctuations
data.description:
According to Foresight News, Business Insider reports that prediction platform Polymarket is pursuing a new round of funding. At least one investor has expressed interest with a valuation of up to $10 billion for the company.
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/29612351139953?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS

data.title: WORLD3 and Hash Global Forge Strategic Partnership to Enhance BNB Ecosystem
data.description: According to Foresight News, decentralized AI platform WORLD3 has announced its collaboration with Hash Global's compliant BNB yield fund, establishing a strategic partnership aimed at creating sustainable value for the BNB community.The partnership seeks to enhance the BNB ecosystem on two fronts. Technologically, WORLD3 will contribute its proven AI automation capabilities, having successfully deployed over 110,000 expert agents on the opBNB chain, executing more than 2.8 million autonomous tasks. On the financial side, Hash Global's BNB yield fund brings institutional investment expertise, targeting an asset management scale of $100 million by the end of the year, with plans to expand to $3 billion within three years.

data.title: Circle Reports Decrease in USDC Circulation Over Recent Week
data.description: According to PANews, official data reveals that Circle issued approximately 4.5 billion USDC and redeemed around 4.6 billion USDC in the week ending September 11, resulting in a net decrease of about 100 million USDC in circulation. The total circulation of USDC stands at 72.4 billion, with reserves amounting to approximately $72.5 billion. These reserves include around $9.3 billion in cash and $63.2 billion held in the Circle Reserve Fund.

data.title: A whale address bought nearly 4,000 ETH 3 hours ago at an average price of $4,780.
data.description: According to monitoring by an on-chain analyst (@ai_9684 xtpa), a whale (address starting with 0x15f) spent 18.91 million DAI to buy 3,956 ETH three hours ago, with an average cost of US$4,780.

data.title: Bitdeer's total Bitcoin holdings exceeded 1,935, and mining output this week was 106.2 BTC.
data.description: Bitdeer, a Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin mining company, released its latest Bitcoin holdings data on the X platform. As of September 12, its total Bitcoin holdings had increased to 1,935.6 (note: this number is net holdings). In addition, its Bitcoin mining output this week was 106.2 BTC, but it sold 105.6 BTC during the same period.

data.title: U.S. Government May Establish Strategic Bitcoin Reserve in 2025
data.description: According to PANews, Galaxy Digital's Head of Research, Alex Thorn, has suggested that the U.S. government is likely to announce the establishment of a Strategic Bitcoin Reserve (SBR) this year, recognizing Bitcoin as a strategic asset. Thorn believes the market is underestimating the possibility of the U.S. forming a strategic Bitcoin reserve in 2025. However, other industry leaders are less optimistic about this timeline. Dave Weisburger, former Chairman of CoinRoutes, predicts that such a move is more likely to occur in 2026, noting that the current administration is prudent and will not announce anything until reaching its initial goals.

data.title: Sei's Kame Aggregator Experiences Hack, Partial Funds Recovered
data.description: According to Foresight News, the Sei trading aggregator Kame Aggregator was targeted by a hacker attack earlier today, resulting in an undisclosed amount of losses. The team announced on social media that they have successfully communicated with the hacker, who agreed to return the funds. So far, 185 ETH has been recovered.

data.title: Bitcoin Miner Inflows Reach Record High in August 2025
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, CryptoOnchain reported on social media that the realized miner inflows to trading platforms reached a historic peak of $1.87 billion in Bitcoin value on August 13, 2025. This marks the largest transfer of Bitcoin value by miners in history.

Two possible explanations for this significant movement are suggested. Firstly, miners may be capitulating under pressure due to rising operational costs and increased network difficulty, a scenario historically associated with cycle bottoms. Secondly, some miners might be strategically cashing in profits at local highs to prepare for potential market corrections.

Regardless of the reasons, the sharp increase in realized inflows highlights the scale of value transfer from miners to trading platforms. This could create substantial supply-side resistance, potentially suppressing upward momentum and increasing the likelihood of heightened market volatility.

data.title: PeckShield flags weird activity tied to Shib token
data.description:
PeckShield flagged suspicious Shibarium activity that led to a $2. 8M exploit through compromised validator keys on Shibaswap.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/peckshield-flags-weird-activity-tied-to-shib/
